what_changed: Rejected non-integer and boolean benchmark token counts at InferenceMeasurement construction.
Rejected non-finite, negative, and boolean benchmark latency values at InferenceMeasurement construction.

pr-evidence/benchmark-measurement-finite.why: V1 benchmark summaries and release evidence should be built from well-formed measurement rows, so malformed latency or token values should fail at the benchmark model boundary before they can contaminate quality and latency comparisons.
